---
title: "Frances Collins"
---

## Frances Collins

**Dates:** (b. Otterbourne 1876)

### Description

schoolmistress

### Biography

She was the daughter of [[person:357]George] and Emma Collins.  Her mother was the postmistress in Otterbourne in 1891.  She had a number of much older half-brothers and half-sisters to whom CMY frequently refers.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 5 th 1900
- Letter from Feb 20th [1897]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
